armor_group.name: Cloth

link.alt: PFS Scenario #1-03: Escaping the Grave pg. 191
link.name: PFS Scenario #1-03: Escaping the Grave pg. 191

armor_group.text:
*Nethys Note: there is no medium or heavy cloth armor, so there is no armor specialization effect for the cloth armor group.*  
  
Clothing isn't armor, but if it has a Dex cap it can accept fundamental and property runes.

stat_block.text: Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with *armor potency* runes.

traits.name: Comfort
traits.text: The armor is so comfortable that you can rest normally while wearing it.
